metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the cc-enslaver discipline plugin.

plugins.name: cc-enslaver
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.15 ships English prompts/en/*.md and a CC_ENSLAVER_LANG=en switch, closing the gap where rules/en/ existed but hook injection was Chinese-only.
